# Diagnostic Patterns

## No Start

Verify mechanical freedom, oil pressure, cranking speed, ignition feed, spark, fuel pressure, fuel quality, throttle position, compression, and timing reference. Do not adjust carburetors before confirming ignition and fuel delivery basics.

## Runs Hot

Check air purge, coolant flow, radiator obstruction, pressure cap, belt/pump drive, fan operation, timing, mixture, oil temperature, and duct sealing. Do not assume radiator capacity until ducting and air exits are verified.

## Low Oil Pressure

Stop combustion testing. Verify gauge/sender, oil level, oil temperature, pump drive, filter bypass, relief valve, pickup/scavenge routing, and bearing-clearance evidence.

## Brake Pull or Long Pedal

Inspect leaks, pad knockback, bearing play, disc runout, master cylinders, balance bar, flex lines, pad condition, caliper piston movement, and air in system before changing bias.

## High-Speed Instability

Inspect tires, pressures, ride height, rake, toe, wheel bearings, steering rack, bump steer, body/undertray fit, and suspension pickup integrity before aerodynamic conclusions.
